problem_summary: Core Health and Performance has built an exceptional local reputation with a perfect 5-star rating across 53 Google reviews, yet the current site offers no direct way for motivated visitors to book a session or take immediate action. A mobile PageSpeed score of 63 creates additional friction for the majority of health and fitness clients who are browsing on their phones. Addressing these gaps would allow the business to convert its existing reputation and organic traffic into confirmed client appointments more consistently.
recommended_solution: A focused conversion improvement package working within the existing Wix site to integrate an online booking or scheduling system, add clear mobile contact actions, and replace manually displayed testimonials with a live Google review embed that keeps social proof current automatically.
scope_of_work: Integrate an online booking or scheduling system, such as Wix Bookings or a Calendly embed, configured for the relevant service types offered, so that visitors who are ready to commit can take action directly from the site.
Add a prominent click-to-call button and a sticky mobile CTA to ensure users on phones can contact or book without excessive scrolling, addressing the most immediate mobile conversion gap.

Replace manually displayed testimonials with a live Google review widget to surface the 5-star rating and 53 reviews dynamically, reducing manual update effort and strengthening credibility signalling for prospective clients.
expected_outcomes: Adding a direct booking pathway should improve the rate at which ready-to-book visitors convert into confirmed appointments without requiring a follow-up phone call or email exchange.
A prominent click-to-call button and sticky mobile CTA is likely to increase direct contact rates from mobile users who prefer to call rather than complete a form.

A live Google review embed should improve the visible impact of the existing 5-star reputation on the site, reducing the need for manual testimonial updates and keeping social proof content current for new visitors.
next_steps: Schedule a 20-minute walkthrough call to confirm which services require booking flows, clarify any existing scheduling tools in use, and agree final scope before work begins.
risks_if_delayed: Each month without a direct booking pathway is a period in which motivated visitors who are ready to schedule a session have no immediate way to act on that intent from the site. Given the strength of the existing Google review reputation, the current setup is not fully converting the trust that has already been built.
